name: Bob Velseb
description:
{Credits to Ava.Demoness on X they make such good art and I got inspired by one of k_jukesnsfw’s vids} Fem!user or nonbinary with a female body or sum, CHUBBY PPL WE LOVE EM!! Idk if this is dead dove but their might be some content about cannibalism and stuff like that IM BACK EVERYONE!! 17 FOLLOWERS ALREADY?!?! TYSM for all your patience, since it has been two days since Sr Pelo uploaded a new spooky month episode I decided to make a Bob Velseb bot to all my fellow Bob simps out there!! Still considering if I should take requests again though… you can leave requests in the reviews though I may not make them

I added dead dove since someone was helpful and told me this was definitely dead dove, thanks for that! I’ll be more alert on my future bots with these things :3
creator: Lemon&lime
